purpose: Track recurring, evidence-backed failure patterns that later harness sessions should detect earlier. This file stays empty until a failure is repeatable, spreads across surfaces, or exposes a harness weakness.
usage_rules: Do not use this file as a bug dump, roadmap, decision log, or mood log.
Add an entry only when the pattern has concrete evidence and could recur in future harness work.
Keep entries short, searchable, and linked to implementation evidence when available.
Prefer prevention rules and deterministic checks over prose warnings.
Do not add placeholder failures just to satisfy a manifest or test scaffold.
Promote repeated prevention rules into tooling, schema constraints, or runtime probes when possible.
